name: chart/radial-bar
description: Concentric radial bars (a circular gauge family) — each datum is a ring whose sweep is proportional to its value.

meta.name: RadialBar
meta.description: Concentric radial bars (a circular gauge family) — each datum is a ring whose sweep is proportional to its value.

props.name: data
props.description: One ring per datum: { id, label, value, color? }.

props.name: size
props.description: Square shorthand (width === height). Explicit width/height win.

props.name: max
props.description: Domain top — the value a full sweep represents. Defaults to the largest datum.

props.name: sweep
props.description: Sweep angle in degrees (270 = a gauge arc; 360 = a full ring).

props.name: centerSlot
props.description: Arbitrary hole content; wins over centerValue/centerLabel.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

props.name: plain
props.description: Marks only — no legend. For micro/inline charts.

examples.title: Goal progress rings
examples.code:
import { RadialBar } from '@cascivo/charts'

<RadialBar
  title="Quarterly goals"
  max={100}
  centerValue="72%"
  centerLabel="On track"
  data={[
    { id: 'rev', label: 'Revenue', value: 84 },
    { id: 'nps', label: 'NPS', value: 61 },
    { id: 'ret', label: 'Retention', value: 72 },
  ]}
/>

whenToUse: Showing a few progress-to-goal values in a compact circular form
A dashboard KPI cluster where each metric is a ring toward its target
whenNotToUse: Comparing many categories precisely — use BarChart
Part-of-whole of a single total — use PieChart

related.name: Meter
related.reason: Use for a single value against thresholds

related.name: PieChart
related.reason: Use for part-of-whole proportions of one total

intent.a11yRationale: Renders with role="img" and requires a title prop for screen reader labeling.
